results.title: Deepgram Pricing Breakdown: And How Open Source Saves 70%
excerpts:
Section Title: ... > How Deepgram Voice Agent API Pricing Works
Content:
**Standard :** For the Standard tier, pricing is $0.0800 per minute on Pay-as-you-Go and $0.0700 per minute on the Growth plan.
**Standard - BYO TTS :** For the Standard - BYO TTS tier, pricing is $0.0600 per minute on Pay-as-you-Go and $0.0500 per minute on the Growth plan.
**Custom - BYO LLM :** For the Custom - BYO LLM tier, pricing is $0.0700 per minute on Pay-as-you-Go and $0.0600 per minute on the Growth plan.
**Custom - BYO LLM + TTS :** For the Custom - BYO LLM + TTS tier, pricing is $0.0500 per minute on Pay-as-you-Go and $0.0400 per minute on the Growth plan.
**Advanced :** For the Advanced tier, pricing is $0.1600 per minute on Pay-as-you-Go and $0.1500 per minute on the Growth plan.
**Advanced - BYO TTS :** The Advanced - BYO TTS plan charges $0.12/min for Pay-As-You-Go and $0.11/min for Growth, offering flexible, usage-based pricing.
 ... 
Section Title: Deepgram Pricing Breakdown: And How Open Source Saves 70% > **Real Cost Breakdown**
Content:
Deepgram Real Cost Breakdown
Deepgram offers a pay-as-you-go pricing model billed per audio minute or hour, with automatic volume discounts and $200 in free starter credits. The Voice Agent API is approximately $4.50/hour (~$0.075/min), covering STT, LLM, and TTS.
Suppose you run 1,000 minutes of real-time voice agent audio in a month on the Voice Agent API :
Voice Agent API cost : 1,000 min × $0.075 = $75
**Total estimated monthly cost :** Around $75

results.title: Deepgram | LinkedIn
excerpts:
Section Title: Deepgram > About us
Content:
Industry-leading models & platform:
👂 Nova-3 — the world’s most accurate real-time speech-to-text model
🔊 Aura-2 — professional, enterprise-grade text-to-speech
💬 Flux — the first Conversational Speech Recognition model designed to handle interruptions
🚀 Voice Agent API — enterprise-ready, real-time conversational AI
🧠 Saga — the Voice OS
Beyond core infrastructure, Deepgram is expanding the Voice AI ecosystem through:
💪 Powered by Deepgram, supporting voice products built by leading AI startups and enterprise organizations
🌉 A new Voice AI Collaboration Hub in San Francisco for builders, partners, and the voice community
🍔 The acquisition of OfOne, delivering real-time Voice AI for restaurants and drive-thru operations with 95%+ containment
📃 A growing patent portfolio in Voice AI
Much like APIs powered the payments and cloud economies, Deepgram is building the foundation for a trillion-dollar B2B Voice AI economy—centered on the most natural human interface: voice.

results.title: Deepgram Reviews 2025: Pricing & Features - Tekpon 2026
excerpts:
Section Title: Deepgram Reviews for 2026 > Deepgram Pricing
Content:
Starting From:
$ 4000 /year
Pricing Model: Subscription
Deepgram offers three pricing tiers: Pay As You Go with $200 in free credits and no minimums; the Growth plan starting at $4,000 per year with discounted rates; and the Enterprise plan beginning at $15,000 per year, featuring custom models, self-hosted deployment, and premium support. Speech-to-text rates vary by model, ranging from $0.0043 to $0.0145 per minute for pre-recorded audio, and text-to-speech costs start at $0.015 per 1,000 characters. Additional services like summarization and sentiment analysis are available at separate per-token rates.
Free Trial
Free Version

excerpts:
Section Title: Deepgram Pricing Explained (2026) > Deepgram Pricing Plans
Content:
All plans are usage-based. Pay-As-You-Go starts with $200 free credit. Growth requires $4,000+ annual prepayment for ~20% discount. STT rates drop to ~$0.003/min at high volumes.
